## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 sentences.

## Scope

- [ ] Desktop app
- [ ] `yaku` CLI
- [ ] Rust core crates
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] Docs or project hygiene

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `cargo check --locked --workspace --all-targets`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked --workspace`

## Notes

Link related issues or mention follow-up work.
